full_text:
Li Wan (Shuwen)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Wan, styledShuwen. Clever, of good character and pretty, she married Jia Chong twice. Li Wan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty.
